meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Escaping Basic App Development (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to pitch high-value AI solutions to clients in this expert-led beginner guide.
content.answer_block: To escape the cycle of basic app development, pivot your pitch from 'coding services' to 'AI-driven business outcomes.' Use Antigravity to rapidly prototype high-value workflows and Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting, allowing you to deliver production-grade software in a fraction of the time required by traditional methods.
content.intro:
You are caught in the 'basic app' trap: grinding out CRUD interfaces for clients who don't understand the value of what you build. Your portfolio is growing, but your margins are shrinking, and you feel like a commodity rather than a strategic partner.

It is time to shift the narrative. By integrating AI-native workflows into your pitching process, you stop selling lines of code and start selling business acceleration. This checklist is your blueprint to transitioning from a developer who builds to an architect who solves, using the exact stack that top-tier AI builders use to scale their freelance operations.

steps.title: Identify the High-Value Pain Point
steps.description: Analyze your prospect's business for repetitive, manual document or data tasks that AI can automate instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this business website [URL] and identify three manual data-heavy processes that could be replaced with an AI-agent workflow to save the client time.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the provided business documentation and draft a 3-point value proposition focusing on AI automation efficiency.'

steps.title: Build a Rapid Proof-of-Concept (PoC)
steps.description: Create a functional prototype in under 60 minutes to prove your capability and build instant trust during the pitch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a functional Python script using LangChain that performs the specific automation task identified in step 1, including error handling and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --path ./src/prototype && claude run 'Implement the core automation logic for the PoC ensuring clean API integration.'

steps.title: Architect the Scalable Solution
steps.description: Structure your code for production readiness so the client sees you as a professional engineer, not a hobbyist.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this prototype into a modular, production-ready microservice architecture. Include documentation for deployment and environment variables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the current codebase into a modular structure with proper error handling and configuration management.'

steps.title: Create a Compelling Pitch Deck
steps.description: Translate technical complexity into business ROI for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 5-slide pitch deck outline that focuses on the 'Before' and 'After' business metrics of implementing this AI solution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a structured pitch deck outline that highlights the technical efficiency and cost savings of this AI integration.'

steps.title: Automate Client Onboarding
steps.description: Set up a streamlined handoff process that makes you look like a seasoned agency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a README and onboarding template that explains how to configure the environment, run the service, and monitor the AI performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a professional README.md and a client-facing onboarding guide for the deployed AI service.'

pro_tips: Always pitch the 'business impact' first; the code is just the vehicle for the ROI.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests; it turns a chore into a competitive advantage.
Keep your PoCs under 100 lines of code to maintain focus on the core value proposition.
Record a 2-minute Loom video walking through the PoC; it increases conversion rates by 40%.
Never show the raw code in a pitch; show the output dashboard or the automated result.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully pitched your first AI-integrated project, focus on building a reusable library of agentic workflows to increase your velocity for the next client.
content.conversion_block: Stop building basic apps and start engineering high-impact AI solutions that clients pay a premium for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
